data.synopsis:
Based on the manga by the same name by Hiroyama Hiroshi, itself a spin-off of the Fate/stay night erotic visual novel by Type-Moon.

Note: Bundled with the limited edition of the sixth Fate/Kaleid Liner Prisma Illya 3rei!! magical girl manga volume.

(Source: AniDB)

titles.title: サムライホルモン THE ANIMATION

data.title: Samurai Hormone The Animation
data.title_japanese: サムライホルモン THE ANIMATION
data.synopsis:
Based on the adult game by Clam Chowder.

Shizume, a kunoichi of the Fuuma clan, fails in her first attempt to retrieve an important scroll from Horimon Juurou and gets disciplined by her father and brother. Will her next attempt succeed or will Horimon prove to be too much for her? Meanwhile, Horimon is also being pursued by Kojuurouta, wanting revenge for him apparently killing her father and stealing the scroll. Will she be resistent to his charms?

(Source: BakaBT)

titles.title: Yasuji''s Pornorama: How About That! Movie
ヤスジのポルノラマ やっちまえ!!

data.title: Yasuji no Pornorama: Yacchimae!!
data.title_japanese: ヤスジのポルノラマ やっちまえ!!
title_synonyms: Yasuji''s Pornorama: How About That! Movie
data.synopsis:
Based on the manga by Tanioka Yasuji.

Japanese society, in the opinion of Pusu-o, "satisfies all the urges of hunger, but not the urges of the loins." Then again, Pusu-o is scrawny, awkward and hardly the handsomest guy in town. More to the point, in matters of a romantic nature, Pusu-o conducts himself with an absolute lack of grace, restraint and general respect for women. Not surprisingly, his sex life is an endless succession of obnoxiously over-the-top come-ons and maniacal attempts to get some action, all of which culminate in total strike-outs. Pusu-o's own father is soon on hand to add insult to injury (the injury being the constant, gushing nosebleeds Pusu-o endures — the nasal blood geyser being Japanese cartoon shorthand for sexual frustration), and the cock blockage continues at Pusu-o's new job as a car salesman — until a trio of older women misinterpret his advances, intended only to make the pretty Yukiko jealous. The antics continue at a later date, when the married Pusu-o is cuckolded by an horny little birdie. When the humiliated surrogate dad witnesses the sexual prowess of the tryst's offspring, matters culminate in a finale worthy of the most bombastic Japanese tragedy. 

(Source: AniDB)

data.title: Military!
data.synopsis:
The story takes place during a conflict between the Krakozhia Dukedom and the Grania Republic. In the midst of the fighting, a savior appears to the Krakozhia Dukedom, and it is a high school student named Yano Souhei. Two female soldiers, First Lieutenant Ruto and Second Lieutenant Haruka, appear in tanks to intrude on Souhei's everyday life, followed by the enemy soldier Shachirofu, all of whom use firearms without hesitation at his house.

(Source: ANN)

data.title: Mama Ohanashi Kikasete
data.synopsis:
Short animated films of well-known Japanese folk tales, including the stories of Taro Maegami, The Riceball Family, The Master of Catching Stars, Thunder is the Bridegroom, and The Elephant's Sneeze. Shown as part of the children's variety
program, Tondeke Gutchonpa.

(Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

titles.title: Boku to Gaku: Ano Natsu no Monogatari
ボクとガク ～あの夏のものがたり～

data.title: Boku to Gaku: Ano Natsu no Monogatari
data.title_japanese: ボクとガク ～あの夏のものがたり～
data.synopsis: An educational film about losing hope in children in Japan. In the movie's example, how it is bad it is to say another child "doesn't stand a chance" or "don't think too much of them, they won't amount to anything" because of their upbringing or background or single action they did.

titles.title: 名前... それは燃えるいのち

data.title: Namae... Sore wa Moeru Inochi
data.title_japanese: 名前... それは燃えるいのち
data.synopsis: An educational film about accepting another's ethnicity and cultural background in Japan.

titles.title: ごめんね, ミーちゃん

data.title: Gomen ne, Mii-chan
data.title_japanese: ごめんね, ミーちゃん
data.synopsis: An educational film about children's animal cruelty in Japan.

data.title: Miitsuketa!
data.synopsis: An educational film about children's inability to value life in Japan. In the movie's example, members of a class neglect their rabbit duties and it dies.

data.title: Kokoro no Koukyougaku
data.synopsis: An educational film about child abuse in Japan.

data.title: Hibike! Wadaiko
data.synopsis: An educational film about the Convention on the Rights of the Child in Japan. In the movie's example, a group of children are practicing taiko (drums) for a recital at the community center. Local adult residents force them to stop, saying that it's selfish for kids to disturb their peace. Their teacher tells them about the Convention on the Rights of the Child so they have the courage to stand up to the the adults to dispel the ideology of "kids don't know anything. They need to shut up and do what we tell them."

data.title: Yooidon!
data.synopsis: An educational film about teamwork in Japan. In the movie's example, a group of kids training for a 3-legged style race but with their entire class. Personalities and physical fitness clash.

titles.title: 盲導犬クイールの一生

data.title: Moudouken Quill no Isshou
data.title_japanese: 盲導犬クイールの一生
data.synopsis: A biographical anime about Quill, a real life guide dog.

data.title: Kokoroya
data.synopsis: An educational film about empathy in Japan. In the movie's example, uses a sci-fi twist to show how the hearts of others to the main character in certain situations.

titles.title: いわたくんちのおばあちゃん

data.title: Iwata Kunchi no Obaachan
data.title_japanese: いわたくんちのおばあちゃん
data.synopsis: An educational film based on a true story of an elementary school boy bringing his wheel-chair bound grandmother to school in order for her to tell the story of her living through WW2 and the atomic bomb.

data.title: Seitokai Yakuindomo* OVA
data.synopsis: OVAs of Seitokai Yakuindomo* which were either bundled with the limited editions of the manga volumes or as standalone OVAs.

data.synopsis:
Based on the picture eBook of the same name.

One by one, with feeling, the Thousand Paper Cranes are folded.
What if, those paper cranes had a "life" of their own...
The purpose given to the Thousand Paper Cranes!
The spectacular adventure of Kenta and Maiko begins now!!
